# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Change Type

- [ ] Initial structure
- [ ] Spec update
- [ ] Package submission
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling or workflow
- [ ] Maintenance

## Scope

List affected paths:

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] specs/
- [ ] packages/
- [ ] examples/
- [ ] scripts/
- [ ] .github/

## Spec and Format Impact

If relevant, describe impact on:

- package format
- metadata schema
- manifest schema
- agent or flow format
- versioning rules

## Validation Checklist

- [ ] Markdown linting passes.
- [ ] New or changed docs are deterministic and clear.
- [ ] Any JSON examples are valid and consistent with specs.
- [ ] Any package or artifact references are accurate.

## Risk and Rollback

- Risk level: low / medium / high
- Rollback plan:

## Related Issues

Closes #
Related #
